disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint identifiers for which offer screens are completely disabled. If the requested touchpoint appears in this list, the offer is blocked and the state is set to CAN_NOT_OPEN with no offer params returned.

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint identifiers for which offer screens are disabled. Provides more granular control than disabled_touchpoints: a touchpoint itself may be enabled, but specific sub-touchpoints within it can be blocked. If the requested sub-touchpoint appears in this list, the offer is blocked and the state is set to CAN_NOT_OPEN.

touchpoints.description: Array of touchpoint configuration objects. Each entry defines offer behavior for one or more touchpoints. When resolving an offer, the system searches for a matching entry by comparing the requested touchpoint against each entry's name and names fields. If no match is found, the entry with name "default" is used as a fallback. Must have a non-empty info array to be considered a valid match.

names.description: Alternative list of touchpoint identifiers that this configuration applies to. If the requested touchpoint matches any string in this list, this TouchPointDetail is selected. Used in addition to the name field to allow a single configuration to serve multiple touchpoints.

name.description: A single touchpoint identifier used to match against the requested touchpoint by exact string comparison. A special value "default" acts as a fallback: if no other TouchPointDetail matches the requested touchpoint, the one with name "default" is used.

info.description: Array of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines a distinct offer with its own screens, session tracking, launch logic rules, and display settings. The system iterates through the array in order; the first entry whose launch logic conditions pass is selected as the active offer.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the thank-you popup to display after a successful offer interaction. Mapped directly to the domain OfferScreenParam.thankYouPopup field.

launch_logic.description: Array of launch logic rule objects. Each object defines a set of conditions that must ALL be satisfied for the offer to be eligible. The system iterates through the array in order and uses the first rule where all conditions pass. If no rule passes, the offer is not shown for this configuration.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with an interstitial ad. The rule passes only if an interstitial ad is available for the touchpoint. Defaults to false when null or omitted.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with a reward-credit ad flow. The rule passes only if a rewarded ad with credit capability is available for the touchpoint. Defaults to false when null or omitted.

install_day_min.description: Minimum (inclusive) number of days since the app was first installed for this rule to match. Calculated as the difference between the current time and the stored first-use date. A value of -1 (or null) means no lower bound.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum (inclusive) editor-done action count required for this rule to match. Checked against the editor done counter stored in a dedicated preferences file. A value of -1 (or null) means no lower bound.

app_session_end.description: Maximum (exclusive) total app session count for this rule to match. The rule matches only when app session count is less than this value. A value of -1 (or null) means no upper bound.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum (exclusive) editor-done action count for this rule to match. The rule matches only when editor done count is less than this value. A value of -1 (or null) means no upper bound.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum (inclusive) in-memory session count for the touchpoint+screens composite key required for this rule to match. This counter resets when the app process restarts. A value of -1 (or null) means no lower bound.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package identifiers. The rule matches only if the user's purchase history shows a prior subscription for at least one of the listed packages. An empty or null list means no restriction on past subscription packages.

user_had_subscription.description: Filter based on whether the user has ever had any subscription. When true, the rule matches only users who previously held a subscription. When false, matches only users who never had a subscription. When null or omitted, no subscription history check is applied.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded interstitial ad. The rule passes only if a rewarded interstitial ad is available for the touchpoint. Defaults to false when null or omitted.

key_session_start.description: Minimum (inclusive) persisted session count (tracked by session_key via SharedPreferences) required for this rule to match. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. A value of -1 (or null) means no lower bound.

install_day_max.description: Maximum (exclusive) number of days since the app was first installed for this rule to match. A value of -1 (or null) means no upper bound.

is_ai_credit.description: Filter based on whether the user is currently in an AI credit flow. When true, the rule matches only during an active AI credit flow. When false, matches only outside an AI credit flow. When null or omitted, no credit flow check is applied.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier to pass to the offer screen when this specific launch logic rule matches. Takes priority over the legacy offer_screen_touch_point field when both are present.

repeat_key_session.description: Key session count modulo interval. The rule matches only when ((keySessionCount + 1) % (repeat_key_session + 1) == 0), causing the offer to repeat at regular intervals of the session_key counter. A value of -1 (or null) means no repeat constraint.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum (inclusive) device storage usage percentage for this rule to match. Checked against the cached storage usage percentage from the storage usage repository. A value of -1 (or null) means no lower bound.

is_store_available.description: Filter based on Google Play Store availability. When true, the rule matches only if Google Play Store is an active payment type on the device. When false, matches only if Google Play Store is not available. Defaults to true when null or omitted.

key_session_end.description: Maximum (exclusive) persisted session count (tracked by session_key) for this rule to match. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. A value of -1 (or null) means no upper bound.

repeat_session.description: App session count modulo interval. The rule matches only when (appSessionCount % repeat_session == 0), causing the offer to appear at regular app session intervals. A value of -1 (or null) means no repeat constraint.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier to pass to the offer screen when this specific launch logic rule matches. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint; used only when offer_screen_touchpoint is not present.

restricted_packages.description: List of package/offer pairs that the user must be eligible for. All entries must pass the isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer check for the rule to match. A null or empty list means no package restriction.

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier to check promotional offer eligibility for.

offer_id.description: The promotional offer identifier to check eligibility for, in combination with the package_id.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type identifiers the user must currently hold for this rule to match. The user's active subscription tier type is compared against these values. The special value "free" matches users who are not subscribed. An empty or null list means no tier restriction.

app_session_start.description: Minimum (inclusive) total app session count required for this rule to match. Checked against the app-wide session counter stored in ad preferences. A value of -1 (or null) means no lower bound.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per calendar day for the touchpoint+screens composite key. The daily counter resets after 24 hours. A value of -1 (or null) means no daily limit.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded ad. The rule passes only if a rewarded ad is currently available for the touchpoint. Defaults to false when null or omitted.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, the offer is skipped if the one-day-pass cooldown period has not yet elapsed. When false or null/omitted, the cooldown check is not applied and the offer can show regardless of cooldown state.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum (exclusive) in-memory session count for the touchpoint+screens composite key for this rule to match. A value of -1 (or null) means no upper bound.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum (exclusive) device storage usage percentage for this rule to match. A value of -1 (or null) means no upper bound.

offer_variant.description: Identifier for the offer screen variant to use when displaying this offer. Mapped directly to OfferScreenParam.offerVariant in the domain model. Defaults to an empty string when null or omitted.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer configuration. Combined with the touchpoint name to form a composite key (touchpoint + "." + screens joined by ".") used for tracking in-memory session counts and daily session counts.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier to pass to the offer screen for analytics or screen resolution. Takes priority over the legacy offer_screen_touch_point field when both are present.

session_key.description: A key used to persist offer display counts across app sessions via SharedPreferences. When non-empty, the key_session_start and key_session_end range checks are evaluated against the stored count for this key. Also incremented each time the offer is shown.

is_one_time_offer.description: When true, this offer is treated as a one-time purchase offer. Mapped to OneTimePurchaseDetails.isOfferOneTime in the domain model. Defaults to false when null or omitted.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier to pass to the offer screen for analytics or screen resolution. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint; used only when offer_screen_touchpoint is not present.
